description: Letter from Ṭoviyya b. ʿEli ha-Kohen to his cousin the judge Natan b. Shelomo of Fustat. In Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: ca. 1140 CE. Very damaged/faded. Mentions lawsuits involving a group of Jews from Ḥevron. Also might mention a market inspector (muḥtasib) (last line of upper margin). (Information from Goitein's index card.)
